creator: hans@nordhaug.priv.no
text:
I approve the patch.

Regards,
Hans Nordhaug

PS! I always dislike that patch-files leave behind .orig-files (ref
    /usr/local/www/piwik/misc/log-analytics/import_logs.py.orig)
    but until something like PR ports/160010 is available, I guess
    it's best ignored.
